since_last: 53% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.17% · BTC +0.56% · Gold -0.04% · Nasdaq100 +0.14%. 53% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.07%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.07%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +4.72%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +4.72%, PUBM +4.08%, MDB +4.07%, TER +3.46%, MRVL +2.93%. Laggards: ORCL -3.48%, DELL -3.35%, TLN -3.14%, TSLA -2.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.60% at $120.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
